Interface NearbyEntityOrBuilder

All Superinterfaces:
com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder
All Known Implementing Classes:
NearbyEntity, NearbyEntity.Builder
@Generated public interface NearbyEntityOrBuilder extends com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder

  • Method Details

    • getEntityId

      int getEntityId()
      The numeric network entity id assigned by the server.
Use this to target the entity in AttackEntity / InteractEntity.
      int32 entity_id = 1 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      The entityId.

    • getEntityType

      String getEntityType()
      The namespaced entity type (e.g. "minecraft:zombie", "minecraft:player").
      string entity_type = 2 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      The entityType.

    • getEntityTypeBytes

      com.google.protobuf.ByteString getEntityTypeBytes()
      The namespaced entity type (e.g. "minecraft:zombie", "minecraft:player").
      string entity_type = 2 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      The bytes for entityType.

    • hasPosition

      boolean hasPosition()
      Current world position of the entity.
      .soulfire.v1.WorldPosition position = 3 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      Whether the position field is set.

    • getPosition

      WorldPosition getPosition()
      Current world position of the entity.
      .soulfire.v1.WorldPosition position = 3 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      The position.

    • getPositionOrBuilder

      WorldPositionOrBuilder getPositionOrBuilder()
      Current world position of the entity.
      .soulfire.v1.WorldPosition position = 3 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];

    • getDistance

      float getDistance()
      Straight-line distance from the bot, in blocks.
      float distance = 4 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Returns:
      The distance.

    • hasDisplayName

      boolean hasDisplayName()
      Display name if the entity has one. For players this is the username.
      optional string display_name = 5;
      Returns:
      Whether the displayName field is set.

    • getDisplayName

      String getDisplayName()
      Display name if the entity has one. For players this is the username.
      optional string display_name = 5;
      Returns:
      The displayName.

    • getDisplayNameBytes

      com.google.protobuf.ByteString getDisplayNameBytes()
      Display name if the entity has one. For players this is the username.
      optional string display_name = 5;
      Returns:
      The bytes for displayName.

    • getIsPlayer

      boolean getIsPlayer()
      True if this entity is a player.
      bool is_player = 6;
      Returns:
      The isPlayer.

    • hasHealth

      boolean hasHealth()
      Current health, if known. Not populated for entities without a health
attribute or when the bot cannot observe it.
      optional float health = 7;
      Returns:
      Whether the health field is set.

    • getHealth

      float getHealth()
      Current health, if known. Not populated for entities without a health
attribute or when the bot cannot observe it.
      optional float health = 7;
      Returns:
      The health.
